---
title: "Week 7"
date: 03-08-26
description: This week looks at building Convolutional Neural Networks.
editor: source
---


## Resources

| Lecture | Slides                   | Videos  | R Code Files |
|---------|--------------------------|---------|----------|
| 1       | [Slides](../lectures/7a) | [Video](https://youtu.be/5fN0KyrNTLg) | [CIFAR-10](../lectures/R/7a.R)  |
